scripts.demo:build: mkdir -p demo/dist && node_modules/.bin/esbuild demo/main.ts --bundle --outfile=demo/dist/main.js --format=esm --target=es2020 && node_modules/.bin/esbuild packages/worker/src/worker.ts --bundle --outfile=demo/dist/worker.js --format=esm --target=es2020 && cp demo/index.html demo/dist/ && cp demo/style.css demo/dist/
